steps.exact_content:
Proposal ID: KITE-2025-09-28-001
To: Halvorsen Procurement Committee
From: Amara Diallo, Kite Robotics

Subject: Component Supply Proposal – Discount Only, Conditional Approval

We propose a component supply agreement with the following terms:
- Discount: 5% volume discount on orders exceeding 10,000 units per quarter.
- Co-marketing: Not included.
- Conditional Approval Clause: This proposal is approved contingent on the condition that no co-marketing clause is added to this agreement at any future point. If a co-marketing clause is introduced, this approval is null and void. The approval vote recorded by the committee shall be considered effective only for the terms stated herein, and any modification to terms after the production freeze date (2025-09-30) shall not retroactively affect this vote.

We request the committee to record its vote before the production freeze date of 2025-09-30.

The approval vote recorded by the committee shall be considered effective only for the terms stated herein, and any modification to terms after the production freeze date (2025-09-30) shall not retroactively affect this vote.

We request the committee to record its vote before the production freeze date of 2025-09-30.
